section_title: Inspection documents.-- After and order for a winding up by or subject to the supervision of the Court the Court may
content:
338. Inspection documents.-- After and order for a winding up by or subject to the supervision of the Court the Court may
make such order for in pectin creators and contributors, of the company of its documents as the Court thinks just, and any
documents in the possession of the company may be inspected creditors or contributors accordingly but not , further or
otherwise.
